arts.ttl: Moyes will push Everton forward - Dyche
arts.sum: Former Everton manager Sean Dyche says successor David Moyes will "build on the stable footing we have implemented".

arts.ttl: Everton vs. Aston Villa: Unai Emery's side looking to set new club record at Goodison Park
arts.sum: Aston Villa will be bidding to set a new club record when they square off against Everton in the Premier League on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Right time to leave amid one of Everton’s ‘toughest periods’ – Sean Dyche
arts.sum: The former Burnley boss spent two years at Goodison Park.

arts.ttl: Villa sign forward Malen from Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: Aston Villa announce the signing of forward Donyell Malen from Borussia Dortmund.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa transfer news: Ex-Nottingham Forest loanee in talks to return to Premier League?
arts.sum: Aston Villa allegedly join the race to sign a player who has previously spent a loan spell with Midlands rivals Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa submit second offer for attacker – Clear advantage, ahead of rival
arts.sum: On January 9th, we covered claims from France which stated Aston Villa have held direct talks over a move for SM Caen’s Tidiam Gomis. Two days later, journalist Sacha Tavolieri said the Villans have made progress to try and sign the 18-year-old. arts.ttl: Eagerness for Moyes to rubber stamp Everton exit – Then €6m negotiation can get going
arts.sum: Beto came off the bench for Everton in their last Premier League game against Bournemouth. It also proved to be Sean Dyche’s last game as Toffees manager and with David Moyes set to start his second stint at Goodison Park today, Beto’s future at the club remains uncertain. arts.ttl: Everton vs Aston Villa – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: David Moyes makes his return as Everton manager when the Toffees take on Aston Villa in the Premier League tonight. Moyes leads Everton for the first time in almost 12 years, having returned to the club for a second spell as manager last week. arts.ttl: Sean Dyche breaks silence after Everton sacking
arts.sum: Sean Dyche has released a statement through the League Managers Association after leaving Everton

arts.ttl: Aston Villa transfer proposal made which could hand Unai Emery a solution
arts.sum: Now into the January transfer window, and centre half Carlos has suitors abroad; Jose Mourinho and Fenerbahce, who are second in the Turkish Super Lig, are keen on signing the player, who arrived from Sevilla for around £26m in the summer of 2022, during the era of Steven Gerrard . Reports in Spain claim that Sevilla want €22m plus €5m in bonuses from Villa if they're to part with Bade - as well as Carlos on loan until the end of the season, with the Lions paying half of his wages.
